# INAZU (https://inazu.app)

> Ride tracking app for bikes and cars.

## About

INAZU helps riders record GPS sessions offline or in the background, save ride recaps (path, stats, speed vs distance chart, notes), sync garage-linked vehicle statistics, and view weekly and monthly progress.

## Key pages

- Home: https://inazu.app/
- Privacy: https://inazu.app/privacy
- Terms: https://inazu.app/terms

## Contact

- hello@inazu.app
